constraint_rule: reuse_scope must be tenant-local or narrower than trace tenant/security evidence
tenant and reuse scope cannot widen beyond trace tenant_id and security_label
lineage and freshness source must match observed tool/run provenance context
parents must resolve to known ABI parent ids before Option C actions
checked target must be present in observed lineage or known ABI parent ids
lossy compression is rejected for correctness-critical objects
durable or infinite lifetime objects require a named retention policy
synthetic/internal inputs cannot be upgraded to production_target
